title: 42cm Wall Hanging Planter - Plastic Plant Flower Pot Indoor Outdoor - Garden Fence Hanging Planters - Venetian Design Drainage Holes - Fence Pot Container - 42 x 18 x 34 cm (2, Black)
features: 𝐇𝐄𝐀𝐕𝐘-𝐃𝐔𝐓𝐘 𝐏𝐋𝐀𝐒𝐓𝐈𝐂 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐒𝐓𝐑𝐔𝐂𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍: Crafted from durable, long-lasting plastic, this wall-mounted planter offers a sturdy solution for displaying plants in any environment, withstanding wear and tear from frequent use.
